title: Tankers learn to Tango
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2025-07-28_tankers-learn-to-tango_img_crude-tanker_fb6f869b3cec.jpg
Argentina has turned into one of the biggest growth stories in oil production globally. Home to the world's fourth largest shale oil reserves, the country has long struggled to properly exploit its resources. In recent years, rapid economic and fiscal reforms have enabled investment and production to take off.
